column1: # Hand-curated description → Unicode entries that are NOT in the
# upstream 外字注記辞書 (gaiji-chuki dictionary). These are special
# placeholder / typographic descriptions where the literal text in
# The upstream dictionary covers the JIS X 0213 gaiji catalogue;
# entries here cover the meta cases (no glyph available, iteration
# marks, etc.) that the dictionary intentionally omits.
# (Same format as aozora-gaiji-chuki.tsv so the generator merges
# 「〓」(U+3013, GETA MARK) — the standard Japanese typographic
# fallback for "this character cannot be typeset right now". When
# the description literally is the geta mark itself, resolve to it.
# appears as a literal description in source.
